name: NorthWest Copper Corp.
description: NorthWest Copper is a copper-gold explorer and developer with a pipeline of advanced and early-stage projects in British Columbia. With a robust portfolio, NorthWest is well positioned to participate fully in a strengthening global copper market. The company's pipeline includes the advanced, high-grade Kwanika-Stardust project, the Lorraine-Top Cat project with existing high-grade resources, and the East Niv copper-gold porphyry system. Their land position of over 175,000 hectares is 100% owned by NorthWest and is strategically located near existing infrastructure, including road access, hydroelectric grid power, and rail, within a stable mining jurisdiction.
